title: Rentokil Live Capture Mouse Traps Blister
features: Ideal for capturing and releasing mice unharmed
Safe: no spring action, no poison
description: This Rentokil PSM68 is a live-capture mouse trap for capturing and releasing mice unharmed. The Rentokil PSM68 trap is designed to be reusable, easy-to-use, no mess, safe and needs no poison. Set the Rentokil PSM68 on a flat surface along a wall where mice run then apply bait such as chocolate spread or peanut butter to the inside of the end cap. Then after capture make sure you release the mouse in a remote location. Always read the label and product information before use.
